mapper.select: SELECT calib_id, equip_type, equip_name, zone_location, meas_location, attach_file, last_calib_dt, next_calib_dt, std_temp, meas_temp, deviation, judgment, status, handler, remark, reg_dt, upd_dt FROM tb_calib_thermocouple WHERE calib_id = #{calibId} AND del_yn = 'N'

SELECT calib_id, equip_type, equip_name, zone_location, next_calib_dt, status, handler, DATEDIFF(next_calib_dt, CURDATE()) AS dday_diff FROM tb_calib_thermocouple WHERE del_yn = 'N' AND next_calib_dt IS NOT NULL AND DATEDIFF(next_calib_dt, CURDATE()) BETWEEN -999 AND 7 ORDER BY next_calib_dt ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_calib_thermocouple (equip_type, equip_name, zone_location, meas_location, last_calib_dt, next_calib_dt, std_temp, meas_temp, deviation, judgment, status, handler, remark) VALUES (#{equipType}, #{equipName}, #{zoneLocation}, #{measLocation}, #{lastCalibDt}, #{nextCalibDt}, #{stdTemp}, #{measTemp}, #{deviation}, #{judgment}, #{status}, #{handler}, #{remark})
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_calib_thermocouple SET equip_type = #{equipType}, equip_name = #{equipName}, zone_location = #{zoneLocation}, meas_location = #{measLocation}, last_calib_dt = #{lastCalibDt}, next_calib_dt = #{nextCalibDt}, std_temp = #{stdTemp}, meas_temp = #{measTemp}, deviation = #{deviation}, judgment = #{judgment}, status = #{status}, handler = #{handler}, remark = #{remark}, upd_dt = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE calib_id = #{calibId}
